1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

2.description: inspect distinct quick-clay risk-class values in utlosningomr

3.description: select quick-clay utlosningomr polygons with the high risk-class (value from step2)

4.description: reduce high-risk polygons to those intersecting Trondheim municipality

5.description: select buildings in Trondheim municipality by kommunenummer

6.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced high-risk quick-clay polygons

7.description: compute distance from each building (from step6) to the municipality centroid (from step1)

8.description: collapse to one row per building taking the minimum distance

9.description: sort buildings by ascending distance to centroid

args.sql:
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '5001'
AND stedfestingverifisert = true;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr
WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '5';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningsnummer, bygningid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, representasjonspunkt
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '5001'
AND stedfestingverifisert = true;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join
-- left_source: 5
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: distance
-- left_source: 6
-- right_source: 1
-- left_geom: "representasjonspunkt"
-- right_geom: "centroid"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: aggregate
-- source_step: 7
-- aggregation_type: "min"
-- group_by: ["objid_left"]
-- metric_column: "distance_m"
-- metric_as: "distance_m"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 9: sort
-- source_step: 8
-- order_by: "distance_m"
-- order_direction: "asc"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 10: limit

-- limit: 10
